claims.text: Multimodal agents can tackle complex reasoning tasks with diverse tools.
claims.source_quote: Multimodal agents can now tackle complex reasoning tasks with diverse tools, yet they still suffer from inefficient tool use and inflexible orchestration in open-ended settings.

claims.text: Multimodal agents suffer from inefficient tool use in open-ended settings.
claims.source_quote: yet they still suffer from inefficient tool use and inflexible orchestration in open-ended settings.

claims.text: Multimodal agents suffer from inflexible orchestration in open-ended settings.
claims.source_quote: yet they still suffer from inefficient tool use and inflexible orchestration in open-ended settings.

claims.text: Experiences provide concise action-level guidance for tool selection and decision making.
claims.source_quote: experiences, providing concise action-level guidance for tool selection and decision making

claims.text: Skills provide structured task-level guidance for planning and tool use.
claims.source_quote: skills, providing structured task-level guidance for planning and tool use

claims.text: XSkill is a dual-stream framework for continual learning from experience and skills in multimodal agents.
claims.source_quote: we propose XSkill, a dual-stream framework for continual learning from experience and skills in multimodal agents.

claims.text: XSkill grounds both knowledge extraction and retrieval in visual observations.
claims.source_quote: XSkill grounds both knowledge extraction and retrieval in visual observations.

claims.text: XSkill distills and consolidates experiences and skills from multi-path rollouts via visually grounded summarization and cross-rollout critique.
claims.source_quote: XSkill distills and consolidates experiences and skills from multi-path rollouts via visually grounded summarization and cross-rollout critique.

claims.text: XSkill retrieves and adapts knowledge to the current visual context during inference.
claims.source_quote: During inference, it retrieves and adapts this knowledge to the current visual context and feeds usage history back into accumulation to form a continual learning loop.

claims.text: XSkill feeds usage history back into accumulation to form a continual learning loop.
claims.source_quote: feeds usage history back into accumulation to form a continual learning loop.

claims.text: XSkill was evaluated on five benchmarks across diverse domains.
claims.source_quote: Evaluated on five benchmarks across diverse domains with four backbone models

claims.text: XSkill was evaluated with four backbone models.
claims.source_quote: Evaluated on five benchmarks across diverse domains with four backbone models
XSkill consistently and substantially outperforms both tool-only and learning-based baselines.
XSkill consistently and substantially outperforms both tool-only and learning-based baselines.
XSkill consistently and substantially outperforms both tool-only and learning-based baselines.
XSkill consistently and substantially outperforms both tool-only and learning-based baselines.

claims.text: The two knowledge streams (experiences and skills) play complementary roles in influencing the reasoning behaviors of agents.
claims.source_quote: Further analysis reveals that the two knowledge streams play complementary roles in influencing the reasoning behaviors of agents

claims.text: XSkill shows superior zero-shot generalization compared to baselines.
XSkill enables continual improvement without parameter updates by learning from past trajectories.
claims.source_quote: A central challenge is enabling such agents to continually improve without parameter updates by learning from past trajectories.
